name: Gideon Herald

sheet.name: Gideon Herald
sheet.background_story:
Gideon lived a life ill regarded by many, feeding himself through underhanded tactics as a thief and hired muscle, until a child was born to him and an escort, Toriel. The girls birth cost Toriel her life, Gideons moved for a new life with the child. In the lands between however, no one is safe from the forces that be, his daughter, has contracted a disease that caused fungal extremities to protrude from her body.
Gideon accompanied by a blind woman who whispers of futures to come, has reclaimed his once discarded armaments in search of a cure for his daughters ailment.
